metadata.description: Fourteen keyless Claude Code skills with memory: research, daily work, and an evidence-gated coding loop

plugins.name: coding-loop
plugins.description: The evidence-gated coding loop: orient (map), build (feature), fix (bugfix), improve (refactor), gate (done), and run it all on one yes (autopilot)

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Cited, engagement-ranked research: community pulse, tech-decision verdicts, job-fit scoring, citation auditing, and competitive recon

plugins.name: daily
plugins.description: Day-to-day skills with memory: a morning briefing, a tutor that remembers what you got wrong, and a retro that turns agent mistakes into one-line fixes
